case_title: KLOS-MONTALBANO CHERYL VS SHOREENSTEIN-NEDERLANDER PRODUCTIONS OF S.F.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KLOS-MONTALBANO CHERYL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHOREENSTEIN-NEDERLANDER PRODUCTIONS OF S.F. $1,332.50 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,352.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,050.00 FILED BY KLOS-MONTALBANO CHERYL AS TO DEFENDANT SHOREENSTEIN-NEDERLANDER PRODUCTIONS OF S.F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-1993 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
CERT. RECEIPT TO PATRICIA HEAGY (HOSE, SHORENSTEIN RETURNED SIGNED.
